headline: EGO Reaches Milestone With First Copper Concentrate at McIlvenna Bay
summary: Eldorado Gold produced its first copper concentrate at McIlvenna Bay, reaching a milestone as the project expands copper exposure and growth plans.

raw.headline: EGO Reaches Milestone With First Copper Concentrate at McIlvenna Bay
raw.summary: Eldorado Gold produced its first copper concentrate at McIlvenna Bay, reaching a milestone as the project expands copper exposure and growth plans.

headline: AU Stock Soars 98% in a Year: What's Aiding Its Performance?
summary: AngloGold Ashanti shares surge 97.9% in a year as strong Q1 earnings, rising gold output, acquisitions and higher gold prices fuel growth.
